reviews.comment:
A ver si arreglan las conexiones del posnet, uno no siempre anda con efectivo encima. Lo peor es que te mienten, te dicen que no tienen super, te enchufan infinia... y sorpresa! viene un  remiserio y si le cargan super.

(Translated by Google)
They need to fix the POS terminal connections; you don't always carry cash. The worst part is they lie to you, telling you they don't have Super, they plug you in with Infinia... and surprise! A taxi driver comes along and they do fill up his tank with Super.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMGZlckdBEAE
